name: Linear
description: Your assigned Linear issues and full-text issue search, via Linear's GraphQL API.

ops.summary: Issues assigned to me (fields: identifier, title, state.name, assignee.name, priority, createdAt)

graphql.query: { viewer { assignedIssues(first:50){ nodes{ identifier title priority createdAt state{ name } assignee{ name } } } } }

ops.summary: Search issues by text (fields: identifier, title, state.name, assignee.name, createdAt)

graphql.query: query($q:String!){ issueSearch(query:$q,first:25){ nodes{ identifier title createdAt state{ name } assignee{ name } } } }
